---
title: "Model Evaluation & Figures"
format: html
---

## Loading model predictions and hyperparameter settings 

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false
#| warning: false

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(purrr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(readr)
  library(quanteda)
  library(quanteda.textmodels)
  library(Matrix)
  library(glmnet)
  library(LiblineaR)
  library(xgboost)
  library(lightgbm)
  library(caret)
  library(pROC)
  library(viridisLite)
  library(jsonlite)
})

options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

data_path <- "../../data/processed_texts/600ad"

corpus_file <- file.path(data_path, "corpus_600ad.csv")
labels_file <- file.path(data_path, "corpus_600ad_labeled.csv")

stopwords_file_1 <- "../../data/stopwords/stopwords_latin1.txt"
stopwords_file_2 <- "../../data/stopwords/stopwords_latin2.txt"

predictions_dir <- "../../results/predictions/non_transformer_lemmatized/600ad"

deployment_outputs_file <- file.path(predictions_dir, "corpus_600ad_model_outputs_oof.csv")
model_outputs_file <- deployment_outputs_file
oof_eval_file <- file.path(predictions_dir, "oof_eval_predictions.csv")
oof_metrics_file <- file.path(predictions_dir, "model_metrics_oof.csv")
oof_metrics_by_fold_file <- file.path(predictions_dir, "model_metrics_oof_by_fold.csv")
oof_confusion_file <- file.path(predictions_dir, "oof_confusion_counts.csv")
deployment_thresholds_file <- file.path(predictions_dir, "model_thresholds_deployment.csv")
legacy_thresholds_file <- file.path(predictions_dir, "model_thresholds_oof.csv")
thresholds_file <- deployment_thresholds_file
hyperparams_full_file <- file.path(predictions_dir, "model_hyperparameters_full.csv")
hyperparams_outer_file <- file.path(predictions_dir, "model_hyperparameters_outer.csv")

bert_dir <- "../../results/predictions/bert_outputs_unlemmatized/600ad"
```

## Hyperparamater loading and model paramaters declarations

```{r}
set.seed(123)

k_folds_outer <- 5L
k_folds_inner <- 5L
min_docfreq <- 3L

`%||%` <- function(x, y) {
  if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0 || all(is.na(x))) y else x
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Hyperparameter readers
# ------------------------------------------------------------
read_hyperparam_table <- function(path) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    return(tibble(
      model = c("naive_bayes", "ridge", "svm_platt", "xgboost", "lightgbm")
    ))
  }
  readr::read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(model = tolower(gsub("[ -]+", "_", model)))
}

model_hyperparameters_full <- read_hyperparam_table(hyperparams_full_file)
model_hyperparameters_outer <- read_hyperparam_table(hyperparams_outer_file)

hp_value <- function(tbl, model_key, col, default = NA_real_) {
  if (!(col %in% names(tbl))) return(default)
  x <- tbl %>%
    filter(model == model_key) %>%
    pull(all_of(col))
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  if (!length(x)) default else x[[1]]
}

ridge_fixed_lambda <- as.numeric(hp_value(model_hyperparameters_full, "ridge", "lambda_1se", 1))
ridge_fixed_alpha  <- as.numeric(hp_value(model_hyperparameters_full, "ridge", "alpha", 0))
svm_fixed_cost <- as.numeric(hp_value(model_hyperparameters_full, "svm_platt", "cost", 1))
xgb_nrounds <- as.integer(round(hp_value(model_hyperparameters_full, "xgboost", "best_nrounds", 300L)))
lgb_nrounds <- as.integer(round(hp_value(model_hyperparameters_full, "lightgbm", "best_nrounds", 300L)))

xgb_base_params <- list(
  booster = "gbtree",
  objective = "binary:logistic",
  eval_metric = "logloss",
  tree_method = "hist",
  eta = as.numeric(hp_value(model_hyperparameters_full, "xgboost", "eta", 0.05)),
  max_depth = as.integer(round(hp_value(model_hyperparameters_full, "xgboost", "max_depth", 6L))),
  min_child_weight = as.numeric(hp_value(model_hyperparameters_full, "xgboost", "min_child_weight", 1)),
  subsample = as.numeric(hp_value(model_hyperparameters_full, "xgboost", "subsample", 0.8)),
  colsample_bytree = as.numeric(hp_value(model_hyperparameters_full, "xgboost", "colsample_bytree", 0.8)),
  gamma = as.numeric(hp_value(model_hyperparameters_full, "xgboost", "gamma", 0))
)

lgb_base_params <- list(
  objective = "binary",
  metric = "binary_logloss",
  boosting = "gbdt",
  learning_rate = as.numeric(hp_value(model_hyperparameters_full, "lightgbm", "learning_rate", 0.05)),
  num_leaves = as.integer(round(hp_value(model_hyperparameters_full, "lightgbm", "num_leaves", 31L))),
  min_data_in_leaf = as.integer(round(hp_value(model_hyperparameters_full, "lightgbm", "min_data_in_leaf", 10L))),
  feature_fraction = as.numeric(hp_value(model_hyperparameters_full, "lightgbm", "feature_fraction", 0.8)),
  bagging_fraction = as.numeric(hp_value(model_hyperparameters_full, "lightgbm", "bagging_fraction", 0.8)),
  bagging_freq = 1L,
  is_unbalance = TRUE,
  first_metric_only = TRUE,
  verbosity = -1
)
```

```{r}
#| label: utilities
#| message: false

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Small utilities
# ------------------------------------------------------------
safe_prob <- function(p, eps = 1e-15) pmin(pmax(as.numeric(p), eps), 1 - eps)
safe_logit <- function(p, eps = 1e-15) qlogis(safe_prob(p, eps))

balanced_weights <- function(y) {
  y <- as.character(y)
  n <- length(y)
  n_pos <- sum(y == "christian")
  n_neg <- sum(y == "non_christian")
  ifelse(y == "christian", n / (2 * n_pos), n / (2 * n_neg))
}

pos_weight <- function(y) {
  y <- as.character(y)
  sum(y == "non_christian") / sum(y == "christian")
}

normalize_binary_label <- function(x) {
  x <- tolower(x)
  gsub("[ -]+", "_", x)
}
```

```{r}
#| label: read-corpus
#| message: false

stopifnot(file.exists(corpus_file))
stopifnot(file.exists(labels_file))
stopifnot(file.exists(stopwords_file_1))
stopifnot(file.exists(stopwords_file_2))

df_raw <- readr::read_csv(corpus_file, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(id = as.character(id)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(text) & text != "") %>%
  mutate(row_id = row_number())

labels <- readr::read_csv(labels_file, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(id = as.character(id)) %>%
  transmute(
    id,
    manual_label = normalize_binary_label(label)
  ) %>%
  filter(manual_label %in% c("christian", "non_christian")) %>%
  distinct(id, .keep_all = TRUE)

df_labeled <- df_raw %>%
  inner_join(labels, by = "id") %>%
  arrange(row_id)

stopifnot(nrow(df_raw) > 0)
stopifnot(nrow(df_labeled) > 0)
stopifnot(all(df_labeled$manual_label %in% c("christian", "non_christian")))
```

```{r}
#| label: stopwords
#| message: false

custom_additions <- c(
  "m", "c", "l", "d", "gt", "lt", "br", "href",
  "fridericus", "heinricus", "conradus", "meus", "tuus"
)

stops_v1 <- scan(stopwords_file_1, what = "character", quiet = TRUE, encoding = "UTF-8")
stops_v2 <- scan(stopwords_file_2, what = "character", comment.char = "#", quiet = TRUE, encoding = "UTF-8")

latin_stops <- c(stops_v1, stops_v2, custom_additions)
latin_stops <- latin_stops[latin_stops != "*"]
latin_stops <- sort(unique(latin_stops))
```

```{r}
#| label: feature-helpers
#| message: false

make_counts_dfm <- function(text_data, stop_list) {
  toks <- tokens(text_data, remove_punct = TRUE, remove_numbers = TRUE) |>
    tokens_remove(pattern = stop_list)
  dfm(toks)
}

fit_tfidf <- function(text_data, stop_list, min_df = min_docfreq) {
  counts <- make_counts_dfm(text_data, stop_list)
  if (min_df > 1L) {
    counts <- dfm_trim(counts, min_docfreq = min_df, docfreq_type = "count")
  }
  stopifnot(nfeat(counts) > 0)
  list(
    features = featnames(counts),
    idf = log((ndoc(counts) + 1) / (docfreq(counts, scheme = "count") + 1)) + 1,
    min_df = min_df
  )
}

transform_tfidf <- function(text_data, tfidf_fit, stop_list) {
  counts <- make_counts_dfm(text_data, stop_list)
  counts <- dfm_match(counts, features = tfidf_fit$features)

  x <- as(counts, "dgCMatrix")
  if (length(x@x)) x@x <- 1 + log(x@x)

  idf_vec <- tfidf_fit$idf[match(colnames(x), names(tfidf_fit$idf))]
  idf_vec[is.na(idf_vec)] <- 0

  x <- x %*% Matrix::Diagonal(x = idf_vec)
  row_norms <- sqrt(Matrix::rowSums(x^2))
  row_norms[row_norms == 0] <- 1
  x <- x / row_norms
  Matrix::drop0(x)
}

get_standard_dfm <- function(text_data, stop_list) {
  make_counts_dfm(text_data, stop_list)
}

get_tfidf_dfm <- function(text_data, stop_list) {
  tfidf_fit_tmp <- fit_tfidf(text_data, stop_list)
  transform_tfidf(text_data, tfidf_fit_tmp, stop_list)
}
```

```{r}
#| label: model-helpers
#| message: false

nb_prob_christian <- function(pred_obj) {
  if ("christian" %in% colnames(pred_obj)) {
    safe_prob(pred_obj[, "christian"])
  } else {
    safe_prob(pred_obj[, ncol(pred_obj)])
  }
}

fit_platt <- function(scores, y) {
  z <- tibble(
    score = as.numeric(scores),
    y = as.integer(as.character(y) == "christian")
  ) %>%
    filter(is.finite(score))

  if (nrow(z) < 10 || length(unique(z$score)) < 2 || length(unique(z$y)) < 2) {
    return(NULL)
  }

  suppressWarnings(
    tryCatch({
      fit <- glm(y ~ score, data = z, family = binomial(), control = glm.control(maxit = 200))
      beta <- coef(fit)[["score"]]
      if (!is.finite(beta) || beta < 0 || abs(beta) > 50) return(NULL)
      fit
    }, error = function(e) NULL)
  )
}

apply_platt <- function(platt, scores) {
  scores <- as.numeric(scores)
  if (is.null(platt)) {
    z <- as.numeric(scale(scores))
    z[!is.finite(z)] <- 0
    return(safe_prob(plogis(z)))
  }
  safe_prob(predict(platt, newdata = data.frame(score = scores), type = "response"))
}

make_inner_folds <- function(y, k = 5, seed = 1) {
  y <- factor(as.character(y), levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
  k_use <- suppressWarnings(min(as.integer(k), min(table(y))))
  if (is.na(k_use) || k_use < 2) return(NULL)
  set.seed(seed)
  caret::createFolds(y, k = k_use, returnTrain = FALSE)
}

predict_nb_score <- function(fit, newx) {
  safe_logit(nb_prob_christian(predict(fit, newdata = newx, type = "probability")))
}

cv_nb_scores <- function(x, y, inner_k = 5, seed = 1) {
  y <- factor(as.character(y), levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
  folds <- make_inner_folds(y, k = inner_k, seed = seed)
  if (is.null(folds)) {
    fit <- textmodel_nb(x, y)
    return(predict_nb_score(fit, x))
  }
  scores <- rep(NA_real_, length(y))
  for (j in seq_along(folds)) {
    va <- folds[[j]]
    tr <- setdiff(seq_along(y), va)
    fit_j <- textmodel_nb(x[tr, ], y[tr])
    scores[va] <- predict_nb_score(fit_j, x[va, ])
  }
  scores
}

fit_nb_with_platt <- function(x, y, inner_k = 5, seed = 1) {
  y <- factor(as.character(y), levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
  scores <- cv_nb_scores(x, y, inner_k = inner_k, seed = seed)
  platt <- fit_platt(scores, y)
  fit <- textmodel_nb(x, y)
  list(model = fit, platt = platt)
}

predict_nb_calibrated <- function(obj, x) {
  score <- predict_nb_score(obj$model, x)
  prob <- apply_platt(obj$platt, score)
  list(prob = prob, score = score)
}

fit_ridge_fixed <- function(x, y, lambda, alpha = ridge_fixed_alpha) {
  glmnet(
    x = x,
    y = as.integer(as.character(y) == "christian"),
    family = "binomial",
    alpha = alpha,
    lambda = lambda,
    standardize = TRUE,
    maxit = 1e6
  )
}

predict_ridge_score <- function(fit, newx) {
  as.numeric(predict(fit, newx = newx, type = "link"))
}

predict_ridge_prob <- function(fit, newx) {
  safe_prob(as.numeric(predict(fit, newx = newx, type = "response")))
}

cv_ridge_scores <- function(x, y, lambda, alpha = ridge_fixed_alpha, inner_k = 5, seed = 1) {
  y <- factor(as.character(y), levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
  folds <- make_inner_folds(y, k = inner_k, seed = seed)
  if (is.null(folds)) {
    fit <- fit_ridge_fixed(x, y, lambda = lambda, alpha = alpha)
    return(predict_ridge_score(fit, x))
  }
  scores <- rep(NA_real_, length(y))
  for (j in seq_along(folds)) {
    va <- folds[[j]]
    tr <- setdiff(seq_along(y), va)
    fit_j <- fit_ridge_fixed(x[tr, , drop = FALSE], y[tr], lambda = lambda, alpha = alpha)
    scores[va] <- predict_ridge_score(fit_j, x[va, , drop = FALSE])
  }
  scores
}

fit_ridge_with_platt <- function(x, y, lambda, alpha = ridge_fixed_alpha, inner_k = 5, seed = 1) {
  y <- factor(as.character(y), levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
  fit <- fit_ridge_fixed(x, y, lambda = lambda, alpha = alpha)
  list(model = fit, lambda = lambda, alpha = alpha)
}

predict_ridge_calibrated <- function(obj, x) {
  score <- predict_ridge_score(obj$model, x)
  prob  <- predict_ridge_prob(obj$model, x)
  list(prob = prob, score = score)
}

fit_svm_fixed <- function(x, y, cost) {
  y <- factor(as.character(y), levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
  fit <- LiblineaR(data = as.matrix(x), target = y, type = 7, cost = cost)
  pred_tr <- predict(fit, as.matrix(x), decisionValues = TRUE)
  raw <- as.numeric(pred_tr$decisionValues[, 1])
  sign_fix <- if (mean(raw[y == "christian"]) >= mean(raw[y == "non_christian"])) 1 else -1
  list(model = fit, sign = sign_fix, cost = cost)
}

predict_svm_score <- function(obj, x) {
  pred <- predict(obj$model, as.matrix(x), decisionValues = TRUE)
  obj$sign * as.numeric(pred$decisionValues[, 1])
}

cv_svm_scores <- function(x, y, cost, inner_k = 5, seed = 1) {
  y <- factor(as.character(y), levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
  folds <- make_inner_folds(y, k = inner_k, seed = seed)
  if (is.null(folds)) {
    fit <- fit_svm_fixed(x, y, cost = cost)
    return(predict_svm_score(fit, x))
  }
  scores <- rep(NA_real_, length(y))
  for (j in seq_along(folds)) {
    va <- folds[[j]]
    tr <- setdiff(seq_along(y), va)
    fit_j <- fit_svm_fixed(x[tr, , drop = FALSE], y[tr], cost = cost)
    scores[va] <- predict_svm_score(fit_j, x[va, , drop = FALSE])
  }
  scores
}

fit_svm_with_platt <- function(x, y, cost = svm_fixed_cost, inner_k = 5, seed = 1) {
  y <- factor(as.character(y), levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
  scores <- cv_svm_scores(x, y, cost = cost, inner_k = inner_k, seed = seed)
  platt <- fit_platt(scores, y)
  fit <- fit_svm_fixed(x, y, cost = cost)
  list(model = fit, platt = platt, cost = cost)
}

predict_svm_calibrated <- function(obj, x) {
  score <- predict_svm_score(obj$model, x)
  prob <- apply_platt(obj$platt, score)
  list(prob = prob, score = score)
}

make_xgb_params <- function(scale_pos_weight = 1) {
  modifyList(xgb_base_params, list(scale_pos_weight = scale_pos_weight))
}

fit_xgb_fixed <- function(x, y, params, nrounds, seed = NULL) {
  if (!is.null(seed)) set.seed(seed)
  xgb.train(
    params = params,
    data = xgb.DMatrix(x, label = as.integer(as.character(y) == "christian")),
    nrounds = as.integer(nrounds),
    verbose = 0
  )
}

predict_xgb_score <- function(fit, x) {
  as.numeric(predict(fit, xgb.DMatrix(x), outputmargin = TRUE))
}

cv_xgb_scores <- function(x, y, inner_k = 5, seed = 1) {
  y <- factor(as.character(y), levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
  folds <- make_inner_folds(y, k = inner_k, seed = seed)
  if (is.null(folds)) {
    fit <- fit_xgb_fixed(
      x, y,
      params = make_xgb_params(scale_pos_weight = pos_weight(y)),
      nrounds = xgb_nrounds,
      seed = seed
    )
    return(predict_xgb_score(fit, x))
  }
  scores <- rep(NA_real_, length(y))
  for (j in seq_along(folds)) {
    va <- folds[[j]]
    tr <- setdiff(seq_along(y), va)
    fit_j <- fit_xgb_fixed(
      x[tr, , drop = FALSE], y[tr],
      params = make_xgb_params(scale_pos_weight = pos_weight(y[tr])),
      nrounds = xgb_nrounds,
      seed = seed + j
    )
    scores[va] <- predict_xgb_score(fit_j, x[va, , drop = FALSE])
  }
  scores
}

fit_xgb_with_platt <- function(x, y, inner_k = 5, seed = 1) {
  y <- factor(as.character(y), levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
  scores <- cv_xgb_scores(x, y, inner_k = inner_k, seed = seed)
  platt <- fit_platt(scores, y)
  fit <- fit_xgb_fixed(
    x, y,
    params = make_xgb_params(scale_pos_weight = pos_weight(y)),
    nrounds = xgb_nrounds,
    seed = seed + 999
  )
  list(model = fit, platt = platt, nrounds = xgb_nrounds, params = xgb_base_params)
}

predict_xgb_calibrated <- function(obj, x) {
  score <- predict_xgb_score(obj$model, x)
  prob <- apply_platt(obj$platt, score)
  list(prob = prob, score = score)
}

make_lgb_dataset_params <- function() {
  list(feature_pre_filter = FALSE)
}

make_lgb_params <- function(seed = 123) {
  modifyList(
    lgb_base_params,
    list(
      seed = seed,
      feature_fraction_seed = seed,
      bagging_seed = seed
    )
  )
}

fit_lgb_fixed <- function(x, y, params, nrounds) {
  dtrain <- lgb.Dataset(
    data = x,
    label = as.integer(as.character(y) == "christian"),
    params = make_lgb_dataset_params(),
    free_raw_data = TRUE
  )
  lgb.train(
    params = params,
    data = dtrain,
    nrounds = as.integer(nrounds),
    verbose = -1
  )
}

predict_lgb_score <- function(model, x, num_iteration = NULL) {
  args <- list(model, x)
  if (!is.null(num_iteration)) args$num_iteration <- as.integer(num_iteration)
  out <- tryCatch(
    do.call(predict, c(args, list(type = "raw"))),
    error = function(e) tryCatch(
      do.call(predict, c(args, list(rawscore = TRUE))),
      error = function(e2) {
        p <- do.call(predict, args)
        qlogis(safe_prob(p))
      }
    )
  )
  as.numeric(out)
}

cv_lgb_scores <- function(x, y, inner_k = 5, seed = 1) {
  y <- factor(as.character(y), levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
  folds <- make_inner_folds(y, k = inner_k, seed = seed)
  if (is.null(folds)) {
    fit <- fit_lgb_fixed(
      x, y,
      params = make_lgb_params(seed = seed),
      nrounds = lgb_nrounds
    )
    return(predict_lgb_score(fit, x, num_iteration = lgb_nrounds))
  }
  scores <- rep(NA_real_, length(y))
  for (j in seq_along(folds)) {
    va <- folds[[j]]
    tr <- setdiff(seq_along(y), va)
    fit_j <- fit_lgb_fixed(
      x[tr, , drop = FALSE], y[tr],
      params = make_lgb_params(seed = seed + j),
      nrounds = lgb_nrounds
    )
    scores[va] <- predict_lgb_score(fit_j, x[va, , drop = FALSE], num_iteration = lgb_nrounds)
  }
  scores
}

fit_lgb_with_platt <- function(x, y, inner_k = 5, seed = 1) {
  y <- factor(as.character(y), levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
  scores <- cv_lgb_scores(x, y, inner_k = inner_k, seed = seed)
  platt <- fit_platt(scores, y)
  fit <- fit_lgb_fixed(
    x, y,
    params = make_lgb_params(seed = seed + 999),
    nrounds = lgb_nrounds
  )
  list(model = fit, platt = platt, nrounds = lgb_nrounds, params = lgb_base_params)
}

predict_lgb_calibrated <- function(obj, x) {
  score <- predict_lgb_score(obj$model, x, num_iteration = obj$nrounds)
  prob <- apply_platt(obj$platt, score)
  list(prob = prob, score = score)
}
```

```{r}
#| label: read-model-outputs
#| message: false

corpus_df <- df_raw %>%
  left_join(labels, by = "id")

stopifnot(file.exists(model_outputs_file))
model_outputs <- readr::read_csv(model_outputs_file, show_col_types = FALSE)

if ("id" %in% names(model_outputs)) {
  model_outputs <- model_outputs %>% mutate(id = as.character(id))
}

join_keys <- intersect(c("id", "row_id"), intersect(names(corpus_df), names(model_outputs)))
if ("id" %in% join_keys) {
  join_keys <- "id"
}
stopifnot(length(join_keys) >= 1)

message("Joining corpus_df to deployment model outputs on: ", paste(join_keys, collapse = ", "))

corpus_df <- corpus_df %>%
  left_join(model_outputs, by = join_keys, suffix = c("", ".model"))

if ("row_id.model" %in% names(corpus_df)) {
  corpus_df$row_id.model <- NULL
}

if ("manual_label.model" %in% names(corpus_df)) {
  corpus_df$manual_label <- coalesce(corpus_df$manual_label, corpus_df$manual_label.model)
  corpus_df$manual_label.model <- NULL
}

if ("prediction_source.model" %in% names(corpus_df) && !"prediction_source" %in% names(corpus_df)) {
  names(corpus_df)[names(corpus_df) == "prediction_source.model"] <- "prediction_source"
}

model_suffix_cols <- grep("\\.model$", names(corpus_df), value = TRUE)
if (length(model_suffix_cols)) {
  for (col in model_suffix_cols) {
    base_col <- sub("\\.model$", "", col)
    if (base_col %in% names(corpus_df)) {
      corpus_df[[base_col]] <- coalesce(corpus_df[[base_col]], corpus_df[[col]])
    } else {
      names(corpus_df)[names(corpus_df) == col] <- base_col
    }
  }
  corpus_df <- corpus_df %>% select(-any_of(model_suffix_cols))
}

corpus_df <- corpus_df %>%
  mutate(
    manual_label = normalize_binary_label(manual_label),
    prediction_source = if ("prediction_source" %in% names(.)) prediction_source else NA_character_
  )

n_labeled_with_probs <- corpus_df %>%
  filter(
    manual_label %in% c("christian", "non_christian"),
    !is.na(prob_nb)
  ) %>%
  nrow()

if (n_labeled_with_probs == 0) {
  warning(
    "Join produced 0 labeled rows with non-NA deployment predictions. ",
    "This typically means the join key ('", paste(join_keys, collapse = "', '"),
    "') did not match between corpus_df and deployment outputs. ",
    "Verify that the id values in corpus_600ad.csv match those in ",
    basename(model_outputs_file), "."
  )
}
message(
  "Labeled rows with deployment predictions after join: ", n_labeled_with_probs,
  " (", sum(corpus_df$manual_label %in% c("christian", "non_christian"), na.rm = TRUE),
  " total labeled)"
)
```

```{r}
#| label: thresholds
#| message: false

if (file.exists(thresholds_file)) {
  thresholds <- readr::read_csv(thresholds_file, show_col_types = FALSE)
} else if (file.exists(legacy_thresholds_file)) {
  thresholds <- readr::read_csv(legacy_thresholds_file, show_col_types = FALSE)
} else {
  thresholds <- tibble(
    model = c("naive_bayes", "ridge", "svm_platt", "xgboost", "lightgbm"),
    threshold_youden = 0.5,
    threshold_f1 = 0.5,
    threshold_scope = "fallback_default"
  )
}

oof_metrics_saved <- if (file.exists(oof_metrics_file)) {
  readr::read_csv(oof_metrics_file, show_col_types = FALSE)
} else {
  NULL
}

oof_metrics_by_fold_saved <- if (file.exists(oof_metrics_by_fold_file)) {
  readr::read_csv(oof_metrics_by_fold_file, show_col_types = FALSE)
} else {
  NULL
}

oof_confusion_saved <- if (file.exists(oof_confusion_file)) {
  readr::read_csv(oof_confusion_file, show_col_types = FALSE)
} else {
  NULL
}

stopifnot(file.exists(oof_eval_file))

required_output_cols <- c(
  "prob_nb", "score_nb_logit", "label_nb_youden",
  "prob_ridge", "score_ridge_logit", "label_ridge_youden",
  "prob_svm", "score_svm_margin", "label_svm_youden",
  "prob_xgb", "score_xgb_margin", "label_xgb_youden",
  "prob_lgb", "score_lgb_margin", "label_lgb_youden"
)

missing_output_cols <- setdiff(required_output_cols, names(corpus_df))
if (length(missing_output_cols)) {
  stop(
    "The saved deployment output file is missing these columns: ",
    paste(missing_output_cols, collapse = ", ")
  )
}

get_saved_threshold <- function(model_key, kind = c("youden", "f1"), tbl = thresholds, default = 0.5) {
  kind <- match.arg(kind)
  col <- if (kind == "youden") "threshold_youden" else "threshold_f1"
  if (!(col %in% names(tbl))) return(default)
  x <- tbl %>%
    filter(model == model_key) %>%
    pull(all_of(col))
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (!length(x)) default else as.numeric(x[[1]])
}

stopifnot(
  exists("corpus_df"),
  exists("df_labeled"),
  exists("latin_stops"),
  exists("make_counts_dfm"),
  exists("fit_tfidf"),
  exists("transform_tfidf"),
  exists("balanced_weights"),
  exists("pos_weight"),
  exists("nb_prob_christian"),
  exists("fit_ridge_with_platt"),
  exists("predict_ridge_calibrated"),
  exists("fit_svm_with_platt"),
  exists("predict_svm_calibrated"),
  exists("xgb_base_params"),
  exists("lgb_base_params"),
  exists("safe_prob"),
  exists("safe_logit")
)
```

```{r}
#| label: bert-inputs
#| message: false

bert_files <- list(
  oof = file.path(bert_dir, "bert_oof_predictions.csv"),
  full = file.path(bert_dir, "bert_full_predictions.csv"),
  learning_curve = file.path(bert_dir, "bert_learning_curve.csv"),
  metrics = file.path(bert_dir, "bert_metrics_oof.csv"),
  config = file.path(bert_dir, "bert_run_config.json"),
  features = NULL
)

bert_config <- if (!is.null(bert_files$config) && file.exists(bert_files$config)) {
  tryCatch(jsonlite::fromJSON(bert_files$config), error = function(e) NULL)
} else {
  NULL
}

bert_metrics_external <- if (!is.null(bert_files$metrics) && file.exists(bert_files$metrics)) {
  tryCatch(readr::read_csv(bert_files$metrics, show_col_types = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)
} else {
  NULL
}

bert_model_name <- "Latin BERT"
bert_model_id <- if (!is.null(bert_config) && !is.null(bert_config$model_name)) as.character(bert_config$model_name) else NA_character_

bert_threshold_youden <- if (!is.null(bert_metrics_external) && "threshold_youden" %in% names(bert_metrics_external)) {
  as.numeric(bert_metrics_external$threshold_youden[[1]])
} else if (!is.null(bert_config) && !is.null(bert_config$threshold_youden)) {
  as.numeric(bert_config$threshold_youden)
} else {
  0.5
}

bert_threshold_f1 <- if (!is.null(bert_metrics_external) && "threshold_f1" %in% names(bert_metrics_external)) {
  as.numeric(bert_metrics_external$threshold_f1[[1]])
} else if (!is.null(bert_config) && !is.null(bert_config$threshold_f1)) {
  as.numeric(bert_config$threshold_f1)
} else {
  0.5
}

overwrite_fig_cache <- FALSE
```

dir.create(cache_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

```{r}
theme_modelviz <- theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_blank(),
    plot.subtitle = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey95", color = NA),
    plot.caption = element_text(color = "grey35")
  )

pal_class <- c(
  "non_christian" = "#D55E00",
  "christian" = "#0072B2"
)

pal_model <- c(
  "Naive Bayes" = "#000000",
  "Elastic-Net Logistic" = "#E69F00",
  "Linear SVM" = "#56B4E9",
  "XGBoost" = "#009E73",
  "LightGBM" = "#CC79A7"
)
```

```{r}
#| label: helper-functions
#| message: false

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Utilities
# ------------------------------------------------------------
first_existing_col <- function(x, candidates) {
  hit <- intersect(candidates, names(x))
  if (length(hit)) hit[[1]] else NA_character_
}

read_table_any <- function(path) {
  ext <- tolower(tools::file_ext(path))
  if (ext == "csv") return(readr::read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE))
  if (ext == "tsv") return(readr::read_tsv(path, show_col_types = FALSE))
  if (ext == "rds") return(readRDS(path))
  stop("Unsupported file type for: ", path)
}

metric_threshold_map <- c(
  naive_bayes = "Naive Bayes",
  ridge = "Elastic-Net Logistic",
  svm_platt = "Linear SVM",
  xgboost = "XGBoost",
  lightgbm = "LightGBM"
)

auc_from <- function(y_true, prob) {
  y_true <- factor(as.character(y_true), levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
  if (length(unique(stats::na.omit(as.character(y_true)))) < 2) return(NA_real_)
  as.numeric(pROC::auc(
    pROC::roc(
      response = y_true,
      predictor = safe_prob(prob),
      levels = c("non_christian", "christian"),
      direction = "<",
      quiet = TRUE
    )
  ))
}

f1_from <- function(y_true, prob, thr = 0.5) {
  y_true <- factor(as.character(y_true), levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
  if (length(unique(stats::na.omit(as.character(y_true)))) < 2) return(NA_real_)
  pred <- factor(
    ifelse(prob >= thr, "christian", "non_christian"),
    levels = c("non_christian", "christian")
  )
  cm <- caret::confusionMatrix(
    pred,
    factor(y_true, levels = c("non_christian", "christian")),
    positive = "christian",
    mode = "prec_recall"
  )
  unname(cm$byClass["F1"])
}

cm_df <- function(y_true, prob, thr = 0.5) {
  pred <- factor(
    ifelse(prob >= thr, "christian", "non_christian"),
    levels = c("non_christian", "christian")
  )
  truth <- factor(y_true, levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
  table(pred = pred, truth = truth) %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    rename(n = Freq) %>%
    mutate(
      pred = factor(pred, levels = c("non_christian", "christian")),
      truth = factor(truth, levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
    )
}

hard_metrics_from_labels <- function(y_true, pred_label) {
  y_true <- factor(as.character(y_true), levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
  pred_label <- factor(as.character(pred_label), levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
  tn <- sum(y_true == "non_christian" & pred_label == "non_christian", na.rm = TRUE)
  fp <- sum(y_true == "non_christian" & pred_label == "christian", na.rm = TRUE)
  fn <- sum(y_true == "christian" & pred_label == "non_christian", na.rm = TRUE)
  tp <- sum(y_true == "christian" & pred_label == "christian", na.rm = TRUE)
  precision <- if ((tp + fp) == 0) NA_real_ else tp / (tp + fp)
  recall <- if ((tp + fn) == 0) NA_real_ else tp / (tp + fn)
  specificity <- if ((tn + fp) == 0) NA_real_ else tn / (tn + fp)
  f1 <- if (is.na(precision) || is.na(recall) || (precision + recall) == 0) NA_real_ else 2 * precision * recall / (precision + recall)
  tibble(
    accuracy = (tp + tn) / length(y_true),
    precision = precision,
    recall = recall,
    specificity = specificity,
    balanced_accuracy = mean(c(recall, specificity), na.rm = TRUE),
    F1 = f1,
    tp = tp,
    tn = tn,
    fp = fp,
    fn = fn
  )
}

make_oof_hard_rows <- function(df, model_name, prob_col, pred_y_col = NULL, pred_f_col = NULL,
                               fold_col = "outer_fold", id_col = "row_id",
                               thr_y = 0.5, thr_f = thr_y) {
  stopifnot(prob_col %in% names(df), "manual_label" %in% names(df), fold_col %in% names(df), id_col %in% names(df))

  build_one <- function(kind, pred_col, thr) {
    pred_label <- if (!is.null(pred_col) && pred_col %in% names(df)) {
      as.character(df[[pred_col]])
    } else {
      ifelse(safe_prob(df[[prob_col]]) >= thr, "christian", "non_christian")
    }

    tibble(
      id = as.character(df[[id_col]]),
      fold = as.integer(df[[fold_col]]),
      model = model_name,
      threshold_kind = kind,
      threshold_value = thr,
      true_label = factor(normalize_binary_label(df$manual_label), levels = c("non_christian", "christian")),
      pred_label = factor(normalize_binary_label(pred_label), levels = c("non_christian", "christian")),
      prob = safe_prob(df[[prob_col]])
    )
  }

  bind_rows(
    build_one("youden", pred_y_col, thr_y),
    build_one("f1", pred_f_col, thr_f)
  )
}

add_scaled_columns <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    group_by(model) %>%
    mutate(
      prob_z = ifelse(sd(prob, na.rm = TRUE) > 0, (prob - mean(prob, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(prob, na.rm = TRUE), 0),
      logit_z = ifelse(sd(logit, na.rm = TRUE) > 0, (logit - mean(logit, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(logit, na.rm = TRUE), 0),
      score_z = ifelse(sd(score, na.rm = TRUE) > 0, (score - mean(score, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(score, na.rm = TRUE), 0),
      prob_01 = ifelse(max(prob, na.rm = TRUE) > min(prob, na.rm = TRUE),
                       (prob - min(prob, na.rm = TRUE)) / (max(prob, na.rm = TRUE) - min(prob, na.rm = TRUE)), 0.5),
      logit_01 = ifelse(max(logit, na.rm = TRUE) > min(logit, na.rm = TRUE),
                        (logit - min(logit, na.rm = TRUE)) / (max(logit, na.rm = TRUE) - min(logit, na.rm = TRUE)), 0.5),
      score_01 = ifelse(max(score, na.rm = TRUE) > min(score, na.rm = TRUE),
                        (score - min(score, na.rm = TRUE)) / (max(score, na.rm = TRUE) - min(score, na.rm = TRUE)), 0.5),
      prob_pct = dplyr::percent_rank(prob),
      logit_pct = dplyr::percent_rank(logit),
      score_pct = dplyr::percent_rank(score)
    ) %>%
    ungroup()
}

build_plot_tables <- function(oof_long, oof_hard_long = NULL) {
  roc_input <- oof_long %>%
    filter(!is.na(true_label), !is.na(prob)) %>%
    group_by(model) %>%
    filter(dplyr::n_distinct(true_label) == 2) %>%
    ungroup()

  if (nrow(roc_input) == 0) {
    stop(
      "roc_input is empty after filtering. This means no model has both ",
      "'christian' and 'non_christian' labels with non-NA probabilities. ",
      "Check that oof_eval_predictions.csv was loaded correctly and ",
      "that oof_long contains valid data."
    )
  }

  roc_list <- split(roc_input, roc_input$model, drop = TRUE) %>%
    map(~pROC::roc(
      .x$true_label,
      .x$prob,
      levels = c("non_christian", "christian"),
      direction = "<",
      quiet = TRUE
    ))

  auc_tbl <- tibble(
    model = factor(names(roc_list), levels = names(pal_model)),
    auc = map_dbl(roc_list, ~as.numeric(pROC::auc(.x)))
  ) %>%
    mutate(model_lab = paste0(as.character(model), " (AUC=", sprintf("%.3f", auc), ")"))

  roc_df <- map2_dfr(roc_list, names(roc_list), function(r, nm) {
    tibble(
      model = factor(nm, levels = names(pal_model)),
      fpr = 1 - r$specificities,
      tpr = r$sensitivities
    )
  }) %>%
    left_join(auc_tbl %>% select(model, model_lab), by = "model") %>%
    mutate(model_lab = factor(model_lab, levels = auc_tbl$model_lab))

  wide_logits <- roc_input %>%
    select(id, model, logit) %>%
    distinct() %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = model, values_from = logit)

  M <- as.matrix(wide_logits %>% select(-id))
  rho <- cor(M, method = "spearman", use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

  rho_df <- as.data.frame(rho) %>%
    mutate(model_x = rownames(.)) %>%
    pivot_longer(-model_x, names_to = "model_y", values_to = "rho") %>%
    mutate(
      model_x = factor(model_x, levels = names(pal_model)),
      model_y = factor(model_y, levels = names(pal_model))
    )

  if (!is.null(oof_hard_long) && nrow(oof_hard_long) > 0) {
    hard_youden <- oof_hard_long %>%
      filter(threshold_kind == "youden", !is.na(true_label), !is.na(pred_label)) %>%
      mutate(
        model = factor(model, levels = names(pal_model)),
        true_label = factor(true_label, levels = c("non_christian", "christian")),
        pred_label = factor(pred_label, levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
      )

    fold_metrics <- hard_youden %>%
      group_by(model, fold) %>%
      group_modify(~hard_metrics_from_labels(.x$true_label, .x$pred_label) %>%
                     transmute(threshold_youden = first(.x$threshold_value), F1 = F1)) %>%
      ungroup()

    cm_long <- hard_youden %>%
      count(model, pred = pred_label, truth = true_label, name = "n") %>%
      mutate(
        pred = factor(pred, levels = c("non_christian", "christian")),
        truth = factor(truth, levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
      )
  } else {
    fold_metrics <- roc_input %>%
      group_by(model, fold) %>%
      summarise(
        threshold_youden = first(threshold_youden),
        F1 = f1_from(true_label, prob, thr = first(threshold_youden)),
        .groups = "drop"
      )

    cm_long <- roc_input %>%
      group_by(model) %>%
      group_modify(~cm_df(.x$true_label, .x$prob, thr = first(.x$threshold_youden))) %>%
      ungroup()
  }

  list(
    roc_list = roc_list,
    auc_tbl = auc_tbl,
    roc_df = roc_df,
    wide_logits = wide_logits,
    rho = rho,
    rho_df = rho_df,
    fold_metrics = fold_metrics,
    cm_long = cm_long
  )
}

save_cache_B <- function(path, plot_tables, top_feats = NULL) {
  saveRDS(
    list(
      created_at = Sys.time(),
      roc_list = plot_tables$roc_list,
      auc_tbl = plot_tables$auc_tbl,
      roc_df = plot_tables$roc_df,
      wide_logits = plot_tables$wide_logits,
      rho = plot_tables$rho,
      rho_df = plot_tables$rho_df,
      top_feats = top_feats,
      fold_metrics = plot_tables$fold_metrics,
      cm_long = plot_tables$cm_long
    ),
    path,
    compress = "xz"
  )
}

read_external_oof <- function(path, truth_lookup, model_name, threshold_youden = NULL) {
  x <- read_table_any(path)

  id_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("row_id", "id", "doc_id"))
  prob_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("prob_bert", "prob", "prob_christian", "p_christian", "bert_prob"))
  logit_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("score_bert_logit", "logit", "bert_logit"))
  score_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("score_bert_margin", "score", "margin", "bert_score"))
  fold_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("outer_fold", "fold", "fold_id"))

  stopifnot(!is.na(id_col), !is.na(prob_col))

  thr_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("threshold_youden", "youden_threshold", "threshold"))
  thr_val <- if (!is.null(threshold_youden) && length(threshold_youden) && is.finite(threshold_youden)) {
    as.numeric(threshold_youden[[1]])
  } else if (!is.na(thr_col)) {
    as.numeric(x[[thr_col]][[1]])
  } else {
    0.5
  }

  out <- x %>%
    transmute(
      row_id = suppressWarnings(as.integer(as.character(.data[[id_col]]))),
      doc_id = if ("id" %in% names(x)) as.character(.data[["id"]]) else as.character(.data[[id_col]]),
      prob = safe_prob(.data[[prob_col]]),
      logit = if (!is.na(logit_col)) as.numeric(.data[[logit_col]]) else safe_logit(.data[[prob_col]]),
      score = if (!is.na(score_col)) {
        as.numeric(.data[[score_col]])
      } else if (!is.na(logit_col)) {
        as.numeric(.data[[logit_col]])
      } else {
        safe_logit(.data[[prob_col]])
      },
      fold = if (!is.na(fold_col)) as.integer(.data[[fold_col]]) else NA_integer_
    ) %>%
    left_join(truth_lookup %>% select(row_id, true_label_row = true_label), by = "row_id") %>%
    left_join(truth_lookup %>% select(id, true_label_id = true_label), by = c("doc_id" = "id")) %>%
    mutate(true_label = coalesce(true_label_row, true_label_id)) %>%
    transmute(
      id = ifelse(!is.na(row_id), as.character(row_id), as.character(doc_id)),
      fold = fold,
      true_label = factor(true_label, levels = c("non_christian", "christian")),
      model = model_name,
      prob = prob,
      logit = logit,
      score = score,
      threshold_youden = thr_val
    )

  out
}

read_external_oof_hard <- function(path, truth_lookup, model_name, threshold_youden = NULL, threshold_f1 = NULL) {
  x <- read_table_any(path)

  id_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("row_id", "id", "doc_id"))
  prob_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("prob_bert", "prob", "prob_christian", "p_christian", "bert_prob"))
  fold_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("outer_fold", "fold", "fold_id"))
  pred_y_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("label_bert_youden", "label_youden", "pred_youden"))
  pred_f_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("label_bert_f1", "label_f1", "pred_f1"))
  label_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("manual_label", "label", "true_label"))

  stopifnot(!is.na(id_col), !is.na(prob_col))

  thr_y_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("threshold_youden", "youden_threshold", "threshold"))
  thr_f_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("threshold_f1", "f1_threshold"))
  thr_y <- if (!is.null(threshold_youden) && length(threshold_youden) && is.finite(threshold_youden)) {
    as.numeric(threshold_youden[[1]])
  } else if (!is.na(thr_y_col)) {
    as.numeric(x[[thr_y_col]][[1]])
  } else {
    0.5
  }
  thr_f <- if (!is.null(threshold_f1) && length(threshold_f1) && is.finite(threshold_f1)) {
    as.numeric(threshold_f1[[1]])
  } else if (!is.na(thr_f_col)) {
    as.numeric(x[[thr_f_col]][[1]])
  } else {
    thr_y
  }

  base <- x %>%
    transmute(
      row_id = suppressWarnings(as.integer(as.character(.data[[id_col]]))),
      doc_id = if ("id" %in% names(x)) as.character(.data[["id"]]) else as.character(.data[[id_col]]),
      outer_fold = if (!is.na(fold_col)) as.integer(.data[[fold_col]]) else NA_integer_,
      manual_label = if (!is.na(label_col)) as.character(.data[[label_col]]) else NA_character_,
      prob_tmp = safe_prob(.data[[prob_col]]),
      pred_y_tmp = if (!is.na(pred_y_col)) as.character(.data[[pred_y_col]]) else NA_character_,
      pred_f_tmp = if (!is.na(pred_f_col)) as.character(.data[[pred_f_col]]) else NA_character_
    ) %>%
    left_join(truth_lookup %>% select(row_id, true_label_row = true_label), by = "row_id") %>%
    left_join(truth_lookup %>% select(id, true_label_id = true_label), by = c("doc_id" = "id")) %>%
    mutate(
      manual_label = coalesce(
        normalize_binary_label(manual_label),
        as.character(true_label_row),
        as.character(true_label_id)
      )
    )

  make_oof_hard_rows(
    df = base %>% transmute(
      row_id = coalesce(row_id, suppressWarnings(as.integer(doc_id))),
      outer_fold = outer_fold,
      manual_label = manual_label,
      prob_model = prob_tmp,
      label_model_youden = pred_y_tmp,
      label_model_f1 = pred_f_tmp
    ),
    model_name = model_name,
    prob_col = "prob_model",
    pred_y_col = "label_model_youden",
    pred_f_col = "label_model_f1",
    fold_col = "outer_fold",
    id_col = "row_id",
    thr_y = thr_y,
    thr_f = thr_f
  )
}

merge_external_full_predictions <- function(df_in, path, model_stub = "bert", threshold_youden = NULL, threshold_f1 = NULL) {
  x <- read_table_any(path)

  id_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("row_id", "id", "doc_id"))
  prob_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("prob_bert", "prob", "prob_christian", "p_christian", "bert_prob"))
  logit_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("score_bert_logit", "logit", "bert_logit"))
  score_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("score_bert_margin", "score", "margin", "bert_score"))

  stopifnot(!is.na(id_col), !is.na(prob_col))

  thr_y_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("threshold_youden", "youden_threshold", "threshold"))
  thr_f1_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("threshold_f1", "f1_threshold"))
  thr_y <- if (!is.null(threshold_youden) && length(threshold_youden) && is.finite(threshold_youden)) {
    as.numeric(threshold_youden[[1]])
  } else if (!is.na(thr_y_col)) {
    as.numeric(x[[thr_y_col]][[1]])
  } else {
    0.5
  }
  thr_f1 <- if (!is.null(threshold_f1) && length(threshold_f1) && is.finite(threshold_f1)) {
    as.numeric(threshold_f1[[1]])
  } else if (!is.na(thr_f1_col)) {
    as.numeric(x[[thr_f1_col]][[1]])
  } else {
    thr_y
  }

  tmp <- x %>%
    transmute(
      row_id = .data[[id_col]],
      prob_ext = safe_prob(.data[[prob_col]]),
      logit_ext = if (!is.na(logit_col)) as.numeric(.data[[logit_col]]) else safe_logit(.data[[prob_col]]),
      score_ext = if (!is.na(score_col)) {
        as.numeric(.data[[score_col]])
      } else if (!is.na(logit_col)) {
        as.numeric(.data[[logit_col]])
      } else {
        safe_logit(.data[[prob_col]])
      }
    )

  out <- df_in %>%
    left_join(tmp, by = "row_id")

  out[[paste0("prob_", model_stub)]] <- out$prob_ext
  out[[paste0("score_", model_stub, "_logit")]] <- out$logit_ext
  out[[paste0("score_", model_stub, "_raw")]] <- out$score_ext
  out[[paste0("threshold_", model_stub, "_youden")]] <- thr_y
  out[[paste0("threshold_", model_stub, "_f1")]] <- thr_f1
  out[[paste0("label_", model_stub, "_youden")]] <- ifelse(out$prob_ext >= thr_y, "christian", "non_christian")
  out[[paste0("label_", model_stub, "_f1")]] <- ifelse(out$prob_ext >= thr_f1, "christian", "non_christian")
  out[[paste0("label_", model_stub)]] <- out[[paste0("label_", model_stub, "_youden")]]

  out %>%
    select(-prob_ext, -logit_ext, -score_ext)
}

read_external_learning_curve <- function(path, model_name) {
  x <- read_table_any(path)

  frac_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("frac", "fraction", "train_frac"))
  rep_col  <- first_existing_col(x, c("rep", "repeat", "repetition"))
  auc_col  <- first_existing_col(x, c("auc", "roc_auc"))
  f1_col   <- first_existing_col(x, c("f1", "f1_score", "f1_youden", "f1_f1"))

  stopifnot(!is.na(frac_col), !is.na(rep_col), !is.na(auc_col))

  x %>%
    transmute(
      model = model_name,
      frac = as.numeric(.data[[frac_col]]),
      rep = as.integer(.data[[rep_col]]),
      auc = as.numeric(.data[[auc_col]]),
      f1 = if (!is.na(f1_col)) as.numeric(.data[[f1_col]]) else NA_real_
    )
}

read_external_features <- function(path, model_name) {
  x <- read_table_any(path)

  feat_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("feature", "term", "token"))
  imp_col  <- first_existing_col(x, c("importance", "weight", "coef", "estimate", "value"))
  dir_col  <- first_existing_col(x, c("direction", "class", "side"))

  if (is.na(feat_col) || is.na(imp_col)) return(NULL)

  x %>%
    transmute(
      model = model_name,
      feature = as.character(.data[[feat_col]]),
      importance = as.numeric(.data[[imp_col]]),
      direction = if (!is.na(dir_col)) as.character(.data[[dir_col]]) else NA_character_
    )
}

make_feature_plot <- function(top_feats) {
  if (is.null(top_feats) || !nrow(top_feats)) return(NULL)

  plot_df <- top_feats %>%
    group_by(model) %>%
    slice_max(order_by = abs(importance), n = 20, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(feature = reorder(feature, importance))

  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = importance, y = feature, fill = model)) +
    geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
    facet_wrap(~ model, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = pal_model) +
    labs(
      x = "Importance",
      y = NULL
    ) +
    theme_modelviz
}
```


```{r}
auc_from <- function(y_true, prob) {
  y_true <- factor(as.character(y_true), levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
  if (length(unique(stats::na.omit(as.character(y_true)))) < 2) return(NA_real_)
  as.numeric(pROC::auc(
    pROC::roc(
      response = y_true,
      predictor = safe_prob(prob),
      levels = c("non_christian", "christian"),
      direction = "<",
      quiet = TRUE
    )
  ))
}

f1_from <- function(y_true, prob, thr = 0.5) {
  y_true <- factor(as.character(y_true), levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
  if (length(unique(stats::na.omit(as.character(y_true)))) < 2) return(NA_real_)
  pred <- factor(
    ifelse(prob >= thr, "christian", "non_christian"),
    levels = c("non_christian", "christian")
  )
  cm <- caret::confusionMatrix(
    pred,
    factor(y_true, levels = c("non_christian", "christian")),
    positive = "christian",
    mode = "prec_recall"
  )
  unname(cm$byClass["F1"])
}

cm_df <- function(y_true, prob, thr = 0.5) {
  pred <- factor(
    ifelse(prob >= thr, "christian", "non_christian"),
    levels = c("non_christian", "christian")
  )
  truth <- factor(y_true, levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
  table(pred = pred, truth = truth) %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    rename(n = Freq) %>%
    mutate(
      pred = factor(pred, levels = c("non_christian", "christian")),
      truth = factor(truth, levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
    )
}

add_scaled_columns <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    group_by(model) %>%
    mutate(
      prob_z = ifelse(sd(prob, na.rm = TRUE) > 0, (prob - mean(prob, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(prob, na.rm = TRUE), 0),
      logit_z = ifelse(sd(logit, na.rm = TRUE) > 0, (logit - mean(logit, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(logit, na.rm = TRUE), 0),
      score_z = ifelse(sd(score, na.rm = TRUE) > 0, (score - mean(score, na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(score, na.rm = TRUE), 0),
      prob_01 = ifelse(max(prob, na.rm = TRUE) > min(prob, na.rm = TRUE),
                       (prob - min(prob, na.rm = TRUE)) / (max(prob, na.rm = TRUE) - min(prob, na.rm = TRUE)), 0.5),
      logit_01 = ifelse(max(logit, na.rm = TRUE) > min(logit, na.rm = TRUE),
                        (logit - min(logit, na.rm = TRUE)) / (max(logit, na.rm = TRUE) - min(logit, na.rm = TRUE)), 0.5),
      score_01 = ifelse(max(score, na.rm = TRUE) > min(score, na.rm = TRUE),
                        (score - min(score, na.rm = TRUE)) / (max(score, na.rm = TRUE) - min(score, na.rm = TRUE)), 0.5),
      prob_pct = dplyr::percent_rank(prob),
      logit_pct = dplyr::percent_rank(logit),
      score_pct = dplyr::percent_rank(score)
    ) %>%
    ungroup()
}

build_plot_tables <- function(oof_long) {
  roc_input <- oof_long %>%
    filter(!is.na(true_label), !is.na(prob)) %>%
    group_by(model) %>%
    filter(dplyr::n_distinct(true_label) == 2) %>%
    ungroup()

  if (nrow(roc_input) == 0) {
    stop(
      "roc_input is empty after filtering. This means no model has both ",
      "'christian' and 'non_christian' labels with non-NA probabilities. ",
      "Check that the join between corpus_df and model_outputs succeeded ",
      "and that oof_long contains valid data."
    )
  }

  # FIX: drop = TRUE prevents split() from creating empty data frames
  # for unused factor levels, which would cause pROC::roc() to error.
  roc_list <- split(roc_input, roc_input$model, drop = TRUE) %>%
    map(~pROC::roc(
      .x$true_label,
      .x$prob,
      levels = c("non_christian", "christian"),
      direction = "<",
      quiet = TRUE
    ))

  auc_tbl <- tibble(
    model = factor(names(roc_list), levels = names(pal_model)),
    auc = map_dbl(roc_list, ~as.numeric(pROC::auc(.x)))
  ) %>%
    mutate(model_lab = paste0(as.character(model), " (AUC=", sprintf("%.3f", auc), ")"))

  roc_df <- map2_dfr(roc_list, names(roc_list), function(r, nm) {
    tibble(
      model = factor(nm, levels = names(pal_model)),
      fpr = 1 - r$specificities,
      tpr = r$sensitivities
    )
  }) %>%
    left_join(auc_tbl %>% select(model, model_lab), by = "model") %>%
    mutate(model_lab = factor(model_lab, levels = auc_tbl$model_lab))

  wide_logits <- roc_input %>%
    select(id, model, logit) %>%
    distinct() %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = model, values_from = logit)

  M <- as.matrix(wide_logits %>% select(-id))
  rho <- cor(M, method = "spearman", use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

  rho_df <- as.data.frame(rho) %>%
    mutate(model_x = rownames(.)) %>%
    pivot_longer(-model_x, names_to = "model_y", values_to = "rho") %>%
    mutate(
      model_x = factor(model_x, levels = names(pal_model)),
      model_y = factor(model_y, levels = names(pal_model))
    )

  fold_metrics <- roc_input %>%
    group_by(model, fold) %>%
    summarise(
      threshold_youden = first(threshold_youden),
      F1 = f1_from(true_label, prob, thr = first(threshold_youden)),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  cm_long <- roc_input %>%
    group_by(model) %>%
    group_modify(~cm_df(.x$true_label, .x$prob, thr = first(.x$threshold_youden))) %>%
    ungroup()

  list(
    roc_list = roc_list,
    auc_tbl = auc_tbl,
    roc_df = roc_df,
    wide_logits = wide_logits,
    rho = rho,
    rho_df = rho_df,
    fold_metrics = fold_metrics,
    cm_long = cm_long
  )
}

save_cache_B <- function(path, plot_tables, top_feats = NULL) {
  saveRDS(
    list(
      created_at = Sys.time(),
      roc_list = plot_tables$roc_list,
      auc_tbl = plot_tables$auc_tbl,
      roc_df = plot_tables$roc_df,
      wide_logits = plot_tables$wide_logits,
      rho = plot_tables$rho,
      rho_df = plot_tables$rho_df,
      top_feats = top_feats,
      fold_metrics = plot_tables$fold_metrics,
      cm_long = plot_tables$cm_long
    ),
    path,
    compress = "xz"
  )
}

read_external_oof <- function(path, truth_lookup, model_name, threshold_youden = NULL) {
  x <- read_table_any(path)

  id_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("row_id", "id", "doc_id"))
  prob_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("prob_bert", "prob", "prob_christian", "p_christian", "bert_prob"))
  logit_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("score_bert_logit", "logit", "bert_logit"))
  score_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("score_bert_margin", "score", "margin", "bert_score"))
  fold_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("fold", "fold_id"))

  stopifnot(!is.na(id_col), !is.na(prob_col))

  thr_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("threshold_youden", "youden_threshold", "threshold"))
  thr_val <- if (!is.null(threshold_youden) && length(threshold_youden) && is.finite(threshold_youden)) {
    as.numeric(threshold_youden[[1]])
  } else if (!is.na(thr_col)) {
    as.numeric(x[[thr_col]][[1]])
  } else {
    0.5
  }

  out <- x %>%
    transmute(
      row_id = suppressWarnings(as.integer(as.character(.data[[id_col]]))),
      doc_id = if ("id" %in% names(x)) as.character(.data[["id"]]) else as.character(.data[[id_col]]),
      prob = safe_prob(.data[[prob_col]]),
      logit = if (!is.na(logit_col)) as.numeric(.data[[logit_col]]) else safe_logit(.data[[prob_col]]),
      score = if (!is.na(score_col)) {
        as.numeric(.data[[score_col]])
      } else if (!is.na(logit_col)) {
        as.numeric(.data[[logit_col]])
      } else {
        safe_logit(.data[[prob_col]])
      },
      fold = if (!is.na(fold_col)) as.integer(.data[[fold_col]]) else NA_integer_
    ) %>%
    left_join(truth_lookup %>% select(row_id, true_label_row = true_label), by = "row_id") %>%
    left_join(truth_lookup %>% select(id, true_label_id = true_label), by = c("doc_id" = "id")) %>%
    mutate(true_label = coalesce(true_label_row, true_label_id)) %>%
    transmute(
      id = ifelse(!is.na(row_id), as.character(row_id), as.character(doc_id)),
      fold = fold,
      true_label = factor(true_label, levels = c("non_christian", "christian")),
      model = model_name,
      prob = prob,
      logit = logit,
      score = score,
      threshold_youden = thr_val
    )

  out
}

merge_external_full_predictions <- function(df_in, path, model_stub = "bert", threshold_youden = NULL, threshold_f1 = NULL) {
  x <- read_table_any(path)

  id_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("row_id", "id", "doc_id"))
  prob_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("prob_bert", "prob", "prob_christian", "p_christian", "bert_prob"))
  logit_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("score_bert_logit", "logit", "bert_logit"))
  score_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("score_bert_margin", "score", "margin", "bert_score"))

  stopifnot(!is.na(id_col), !is.na(prob_col))

  thr_y_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("threshold_youden", "youden_threshold", "threshold"))
  thr_f1_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("threshold_f1", "f1_threshold"))
  thr_y <- if (!is.null(threshold_youden) && length(threshold_youden) && is.finite(threshold_youden)) {
    as.numeric(threshold_youden[[1]])
  } else if (!is.na(thr_y_col)) {
    as.numeric(x[[thr_y_col]][[1]])
  } else {
    0.5
  }
  thr_f1 <- if (!is.null(threshold_f1) && length(threshold_f1) && is.finite(threshold_f1)) {
    as.numeric(threshold_f1[[1]])
  } else if (!is.na(thr_f1_col)) {
    as.numeric(x[[thr_f1_col]][[1]])
  } else {
    thr_y
  }

  tmp <- x %>%
    transmute(
      row_id = .data[[id_col]],
      prob_ext = safe_prob(.data[[prob_col]]),
      logit_ext = if (!is.na(logit_col)) as.numeric(.data[[logit_col]]) else safe_logit(.data[[prob_col]]),
      score_ext = if (!is.na(score_col)) {
        as.numeric(.data[[score_col]])
      } else if (!is.na(logit_col)) {
        as.numeric(.data[[logit_col]])
      } else {
        safe_logit(.data[[prob_col]])
      }
    )

  out <- df_in %>%
    left_join(tmp, by = "row_id")

  out[[paste0("prob_", model_stub)]] <- out$prob_ext
  out[[paste0("score_", model_stub, "_logit")]] <- out$logit_ext
  out[[paste0("score_", model_stub, "_raw")]] <- out$score_ext
  out[[paste0("threshold_", model_stub, "_youden")]] <- thr_y
  out[[paste0("threshold_", model_stub, "_f1")]] <- thr_f1
  out[[paste0("label_", model_stub, "_youden")]] <- ifelse(out$prob_ext >= thr_y, "christian", "non_christian")
  out[[paste0("label_", model_stub, "_f1")]] <- ifelse(out$prob_ext >= thr_f1, "christian", "non_christian")
  out[[paste0("label_", model_stub)]] <- out[[paste0("label_", model_stub, "_youden")]]

  out %>%
    select(-prob_ext, -logit_ext, -score_ext)
}

read_external_learning_curve <- function(path, model_name) {
  x <- read_table_any(path)

  frac_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("frac", "fraction", "train_frac"))
  rep_col  <- first_existing_col(x, c("rep", "repeat", "repetition"))
  auc_col  <- first_existing_col(x, c("auc", "roc_auc"))
  f1_col   <- first_existing_col(x, c("f1", "f1_score", "f1_youden", "f1_f1"))

  stopifnot(!is.na(frac_col), !is.na(rep_col), !is.na(auc_col))

  x %>%
    transmute(
      model = model_name,
      frac = as.numeric(.data[[frac_col]]),
      rep = as.integer(.data[[rep_col]]),
      auc = as.numeric(.data[[auc_col]]),
      f1 = if (!is.na(f1_col)) as.numeric(.data[[f1_col]]) else NA_real_
    )
}

read_external_features <- function(path, model_name) {
  x <- read_table_any(path)

  feat_col <- first_existing_col(x, c("feature", "term", "token"))
  imp_col  <- first_existing_col(x, c("importance", "weight", "coef", "estimate", "value"))
  dir_col  <- first_existing_col(x, c("direction", "class", "side"))

  if (is.na(feat_col) || is.na(imp_col)) return(NULL)

  x %>%
    transmute(
      model = model_name,
      feature = as.character(.data[[feat_col]]),
      importance = as.numeric(.data[[imp_col]]),
      direction = if (!is.na(dir_col)) as.character(.data[[dir_col]]) else NA_character_
    )
}

make_feature_plot <- function(top_feats) {
  if (is.null(top_feats) || !nrow(top_feats)) return(NULL)

  plot_df <- top_feats %>%
    group_by(model) %>%
    slice_max(order_by = abs(importance), n = 20, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(feature = reorder(feature, importance))

  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = importance, y = feature, fill = model)) +
    geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
    facet_wrap(~ model, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = pal_model) +
    labs(
      x = "Importance",
      y = NULL
    ) +
    theme_modelviz
}
```

```{r}
#| label: build-oof-long
#| message: false

threshold_tbl <- thresholds %>%
  mutate(model = recode(model, !!!metric_threshold_map)) %>%
  select(model, threshold_youden)

if (!nrow(threshold_tbl)) {
  threshold_tbl <- tibble(
    model = names(pal_model),
    threshold_youden = 0.5
  )
}

cache_A <- file.path(cache_dir, "cache_A_oof_learning_official_eval_v2.rds")
cache_B <- file.path(cache_dir, "cache_B_plot_tables_official_eval_v2.rds")

if (file.exists(cache_A) && !overwrite_fig_cache) {
  A <- readRDS(cache_A)
  oof_long <- A$oof_long
  oof_hard_long <- A$oof_hard_long %||% NULL
  lc_res <- A$lc_res
  pal_model <- A$pal_model
  pal_class <- A$pal_class
  threshold_tbl <- A$threshold_tbl
} else {
  truth_lookup <- df_labeled %>%
    mutate(
      manual_label = normalize_binary_label(manual_label),
      true_label = factor(manual_label, levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
    ) %>%
    arrange(row_id) %>%
    select(row_id, id, true_label)

  oof_eval <- readr::read_csv(oof_eval_file, show_col_types = FALSE)
  if (!"id" %in% names(oof_eval)) {
    oof_eval$id <- as.character(oof_eval$row_id)
  }
  oof_eval <- oof_eval %>%
    mutate(
      id = as.character(id),
      manual_label = normalize_binary_label(manual_label)
    )

  has_nb_logit <- "score_nb_logit" %in% names(oof_eval)
  has_ridge_logit <- "score_ridge_logit" %in% names(oof_eval)
  has_svm_logit <- "score_svm_logit" %in% names(oof_eval)
  has_xgb_logit <- "score_xgb_logit" %in% names(oof_eval)
  has_lgb_logit <- "score_lgb_logit" %in% names(oof_eval)

  fold_col <- first_existing_col(oof_eval, c("outer_fold", "fold", "fold_id"))
  if (is.na(fold_col)) {
    stop("oof_eval_predictions.csv is missing an outer-fold column (expected one of: outer_fold, fold, fold_id).")
  }

  required_oof_cols <- c(
    "row_id", "manual_label",
    "prob_nb", "score_nb_logit", "label_nb_youden", "label_nb_f1",
    "prob_ridge", "score_ridge_logit", "label_ridge_youden", "label_ridge_f1",
    "prob_svm", "score_svm_margin", "label_svm_youden", "label_svm_f1",
    "prob_xgb", "score_xgb_margin", "label_xgb_youden", "label_xgb_f1",
    "prob_lgb", "score_lgb_margin", "label_lgb_youden", "label_lgb_f1"
  )

  missing_oof_cols <- setdiff(required_oof_cols, names(oof_eval))
  if (length(missing_oof_cols)) {
    stop(
      "oof_eval_predictions.csv is missing these columns: ",
      paste(missing_oof_cols, collapse = ", ")
    )
  }

  oof_base <- oof_eval %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(manual_label),
      manual_label %in% c("christian", "non_christian"),
      !is.na(prob_nb),
      !is.na(prob_ridge),
      !is.na(prob_svm),
      !is.na(prob_xgb),
      !is.na(prob_lgb)
    ) %>%
    transmute(
      id = as.character(row_id),
      fold = as.integer(.data[[fold_col]]),
      true_label = factor(manual_label, levels = c("non_christian", "christian")),
      prob_nb = safe_prob(prob_nb),
      logit_nb = if (has_nb_logit) as.numeric(score_nb_logit) else safe_logit(prob_nb),
      score_nb = if (has_nb_logit) as.numeric(score_nb_logit) else safe_logit(prob_nb),
      prob_ridge = safe_prob(prob_ridge),
      logit_ridge = if (has_ridge_logit) as.numeric(score_ridge_logit) else safe_logit(prob_ridge),
      score_ridge = if (has_ridge_logit) as.numeric(score_ridge_logit) else safe_logit(prob_ridge),
      prob_svm = safe_prob(prob_svm),
      logit_svm = if (has_svm_logit) as.numeric(score_svm_logit) else safe_logit(prob_svm),
      score_svm = as.numeric(score_svm_margin),
      prob_xgb = safe_prob(prob_xgb),
      logit_xgb = if (has_xgb_logit) as.numeric(score_xgb_logit) else safe_logit(prob_xgb),
      score_xgb = as.numeric(score_xgb_margin),
      prob_lgb = safe_prob(prob_lgb),
      logit_lgb = if (has_lgb_logit) as.numeric(score_lgb_logit) else safe_logit(prob_lgb),
      score_lgb = as.numeric(score_lgb_margin)
    )

  if (nrow(oof_base) == 0) {
    stop(
      "oof_base has 0 rows. This means no labeled rows in oof_eval_predictions.csv have ",
      "non-NA prediction columns. Verify that oof_eval_predictions.csv was written correctly."
    )
  }

  message(
    "oof_base: ", nrow(oof_base), " rows, ",
    sum(oof_base$true_label == "christian"), " christian, ",
    sum(oof_base$true_label == "non_christian"), " non_christian"
  )

  oof_long <- bind_rows(
    oof_base %>% transmute(id, fold, true_label, model = "Naive Bayes", prob = prob_nb, logit = logit_nb, score = score_nb),
    oof_base %>% transmute(id, fold, true_label, model = "Elastic-Net Logistic", prob = prob_ridge, logit = logit_ridge, score = score_ridge),
    oof_base %>% transmute(id, fold, true_label, model = "Linear SVM", prob = prob_svm, logit = logit_svm, score = score_svm),
    oof_base %>% transmute(id, fold, true_label, model = "XGBoost", prob = prob_xgb, logit = logit_xgb, score = score_xgb),
    oof_base %>% transmute(id, fold, true_label, model = "LightGBM", prob = prob_lgb, logit = logit_lgb, score = score_lgb)
  ) %>%
    left_join(threshold_tbl, by = "model")

  oof_hard_long <- bind_rows(
    make_oof_hard_rows(
      oof_eval,
      model_name = "Naive Bayes",
      prob_col = "prob_nb",
      pred_y_col = "label_nb_youden",
      pred_f_col = "label_nb_f1",
      fold_col = fold_col,
      id_col = "row_id",
      thr_y = get_saved_threshold("naive_bayes", "youden"),
      thr_f = get_saved_threshold("naive_bayes", "f1")
    ),
    make_oof_hard_rows(
      oof_eval,
      model_name = "Elastic-Net Logistic",
      prob_col = "prob_ridge",
      pred_y_col = "label_ridge_youden",
      pred_f_col = "label_ridge_f1",
      fold_col = fold_col,
      id_col = "row_id",
      thr_y = get_saved_threshold("ridge", "youden"),
      thr_f = get_saved_threshold("ridge", "f1")
    ),
    make_oof_hard_rows(
      oof_eval,
      model_name = "Linear SVM",
      prob_col = "prob_svm",
      pred_y_col = "label_svm_youden",
      pred_f_col = "label_svm_f1",
      fold_col = fold_col,
      id_col = "row_id",
      thr_y = get_saved_threshold("svm_platt", "youden"),
      thr_f = get_saved_threshold("svm_platt", "f1")
    ),
    make_oof_hard_rows(
      oof_eval,
      model_name = "XGBoost",
      prob_col = "prob_xgb",
      pred_y_col = "label_xgb_youden",
      pred_f_col = "label_xgb_f1",
      fold_col = fold_col,
      id_col = "row_id",
      thr_y = get_saved_threshold("xgboost", "youden"),
      thr_f = get_saved_threshold("xgboost", "f1")
    ),
    make_oof_hard_rows(
      oof_eval,
      model_name = "LightGBM",
      prob_col = "prob_lgb",
      pred_y_col = "label_lgb_youden",
      pred_f_col = "label_lgb_f1",
      fold_col = fold_col,
      id_col = "row_id",
      thr_y = get_saved_threshold("lightgbm", "youden"),
      thr_f = get_saved_threshold("lightgbm", "f1")
    )
  )

  if (!is.null(bert_files$oof) && file.exists(bert_files$oof)) {
    oof_bert <- read_external_oof(
      path = bert_files$oof,
      truth_lookup = truth_lookup,
      model_name = bert_model_name,
      threshold_youden = bert_threshold_youden
    )
    oof_long <- bind_rows(oof_long, oof_bert)

    oof_hard_bert <- read_external_oof_hard(
      path = bert_files$oof,
      truth_lookup = truth_lookup,
      model_name = bert_model_name,
      threshold_youden = bert_threshold_youden,
      threshold_f1 = bert_threshold_f1
    )
    oof_hard_long <- bind_rows(oof_hard_long, oof_hard_bert)

    threshold_tbl <- bind_rows(
      threshold_tbl,
      tibble(model = bert_model_name, threshold_youden = unique(oof_bert$threshold_youden)[1])
    ) %>%
      distinct(model, .keep_all = TRUE)
    pal_model[bert_model_name] <- "#7A3E9D"
  }

  oof_long <- oof_long %>%
    mutate(
      model = factor(model, levels = names(pal_model)),
      true_label = factor(true_label, levels = c("non_christian", "christian")),
      threshold_youden = ifelse(is.na(threshold_youden), 0.5, threshold_youden)
    ) %>%
    add_scaled_columns()

  oof_hard_long <- oof_hard_long %>%
    mutate(
      model = factor(model, levels = names(pal_model)),
      true_label = factor(true_label, levels = c("non_christian", "christian")),
      pred_label = factor(pred_label, levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
    )

  print(
    oof_long %>%
      count(model, true_label) %>%
      tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = true_label, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)
  )

  if (!is.null(bert_files$full) && file.exists(bert_files$full)) {
    corpus_df <- merge_external_full_predictions(
      df_in = corpus_df,
      path = bert_files$full,
      model_stub = "bert",
      threshold_youden = bert_threshold_youden,
      threshold_f1 = bert_threshold_f1
    )
  }

  stratified_idx <- function(y, frac, seed = 1, k = 5, min_per_class = 20) {
    set.seed(seed)
    y <- factor(y, levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
    idx_ch <- which(y == "christian")
    idx_nc <- which(y == "non_christian")

    n_ch <- min(length(idx_ch), max(min_per_class, k, floor(length(idx_ch) * frac)))
    n_nc <- min(length(idx_nc), max(min_per_class, k, floor(length(idx_nc) * frac)))

    c(sample(idx_ch, n_ch), sample(idx_nc, n_nc))
  }

  oof_for_model <- function(model, idx, k = 5, seed = 1, progress_prefix = "", thr = 0.5) {
    lab_sub <- df_labeled %>%
      mutate(manual_label = normalize_binary_label(manual_label)) %>%
      arrange(row_id)

    y <- factor(lab_sub$manual_label[idx], levels = c("non_christian", "christian"))
    text <- lab_sub$text[idx]

    k_sub <- min(k, min(table(y)))
    if (is.na(k_sub) || k_sub < 2) k_sub <- 2

    set.seed(seed)
    folds_sub <- caret::createFolds(y, k = k_sub, returnTrain = FALSE)
    prob <- rep(NA_real_, length(idx))

    for (fi in seq_along(folds_sub)) {
      te <- folds_sub[[fi]]
      tr <- setdiff(seq_along(idx), te)
      y_tr <- y[tr]

      message(sprintf(
        "%smodel=%s | fold %d/%d | train n=%d | test n=%d",
        progress_prefix, model, fi, length(folds_sub), length(tr), length(te)
      ))
      flush.console()

      if (model == "Naive Bayes") {
        x_tr <- make_counts_dfm(text[tr], latin_stops)
        x_te <- dfm_match(make_counts_dfm(text[te], latin_stops), featnames(x_tr))
        fit <- fit_nb_with_platt(
          x_tr,
          y_tr,
          inner_k = min(k_folds_inner, min(table(y_tr))),
          seed = seed + fi
        )
        pred <- predict_nb_calibrated(fit, x_te)
        prob[te] <- safe_prob(pred$prob)
      }

      if (model %in% c("Elastic-Net Logistic", "Linear SVM", "XGBoost", "LightGBM")) {
        tfidf_fit_fold <- fit_tfidf(text[tr], latin_stops, min_df = min_docfreq)
        x_tr <- transform_tfidf(text[tr], tfidf_fit_fold, latin_stops)
        x_te <- transform_tfidf(text[te], tfidf_fit_fold, latin_stops)
      }

      if (model == "Elastic-Net Logistic") {
        fit <- fit_ridge_with_platt(
          x_tr,
          y_tr,
          lambda = ridge_fixed_lambda,
          alpha = ridge_fixed_alpha,
          inner_k = min(k_folds_inner, min(table(y_tr))),
          seed = seed + fi
        )
        pred <- predict_ridge_calibrated(fit, x_te)
        prob[te] <- safe_prob(pred$prob)
      }

      if (model == "Linear SVM") {
        fit <- fit_svm_with_platt(
          x_tr,
          y_tr,
          cost = svm_fixed_cost,
          inner_k = min(k_folds_inner, min(table(y_tr))),
          seed = seed + fi
        )
        pred <- predict_svm_calibrated(fit, x_te)
        prob[te] <- safe_prob(pred$prob)
      }

      if (model == "XGBoost") {
        fit <- fit_xgb_with_platt(
          x_tr,
          y_tr,
          inner_k = min(k_folds_inner, min(table(y_tr))),
          seed = seed + fi
        )
        pred <- predict_xgb_calibrated(fit, x_te)
        prob[te] <- safe_prob(pred$prob)
      }

      if (model == "LightGBM") {
        fit <- fit_lgb_with_platt(
          x_tr,
          y_tr,
          inner_k = min(k_folds_inner, min(table(y_tr))),
          seed = seed + fi
        )
        pred <- predict_lgb_calibrated(fit, x_te)
        prob[te] <- safe_prob(pred$prob)
      }
    }

    tibble(
      model = model,
      auc = auc_from(y, prob),
      f1 = f1_from(y, prob, thr = thr)
    )
  }

  run_learning_curves_cached <- function(
    fractions = c(0.10, 0.25, 0.50, 0.75, 1.00),
    reps = 2,
    k = 5,
    min_per_class = 20,
    cache_jobs = file.path(cache_dir, "lc_jobs"),
    master_cache = file.path(cache_dir, "lc_res_full.rds"),
    overwrite = FALSE
  ) {
    dir.create(cache_jobs, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

    if (file.exists(master_cache) && !overwrite) {
      return(readRDS(master_cache))
    }

    y_all <- df_labeled %>%
      mutate(manual_label = normalize_binary_label(manual_label)) %>%
      arrange(row_id) %>%
      pull(manual_label)

    models <- c("Naive Bayes", "Elastic-Net Logistic", "Linear SVM", "XGBoost", "LightGBM")

    job_grid <- tidyr::expand_grid(frac = fractions, rep = seq_len(reps), model = models) %>%
      mutate(
        frac_pct = round(frac * 100),
        model_key = gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "_", model),
        job_file = file.path(cache_jobs, sprintf("lc_frac%03d_rep%02d_%s.rds", frac_pct, rep, model_key))
      )

    sub_idx_tbl <- tidyr::expand_grid(frac = fractions, rep = seq_len(reps)) %>%
      mutate(
        seed = 7000 + rep,
        idx = purrr::map2(frac, seed, ~stratified_idx(y_all, .x, .y, k = k, min_per_class = min_per_class))
      ) %>%
      select(frac, rep, idx)

    job_grid <- left_join(job_grid, sub_idx_tbl, by = c("frac", "rep"))

    for (j in seq_len(nrow(job_grid))) {
      frac <- job_grid$frac[j]
      repi <- job_grid$rep[j]
      model <- job_grid$model[j]
      idx <- job_grid$idx[[j]]
      job_file <- job_grid$job_file[j]

      if (file.exists(job_file) && !overwrite) next

      res <- oof_for_model(
        model = model,
        idx = idx,
        k = k,
        seed = 9000 + repi,
        thr = threshold_tbl$threshold_youden[match(model, threshold_tbl$model)] %||% 0.5,
        progress_prefix = sprintf("[LC frac=%.2f rep=%d] ", frac, repi)
      ) %>%
        mutate(frac = frac, rep = repi)

      saveRDS(res, job_file, compress = "xz")
    }

    files <- job_grid$job_file[file.exists(job_grid$job_file)]
    lc_res <- bind_rows(lapply(files, readRDS)) %>%
      mutate(
        model = factor(model, levels = names(pal_model)),
        frac = as.numeric(frac),
        rep = as.integer(rep)
      )

    saveRDS(lc_res, master_cache, compress = "xz")
    lc_res
  }

  fractions <- c(0.10, 0.25, 0.50, 0.75, 1.00)
  reps <- 2

  lc_res <- run_learning_curves_cached(
    fractions = fractions,
    reps = reps,
    k = min(k_folds_outer, min(table(df_labeled$manual_label))),
    min_per_class = 20,
    cache_jobs = file.path(cache_dir, "lc_jobs"),
    master_cache = file.path(cache_dir, "lc_res_full.rds"),
    overwrite = overwrite_fig_cache
  )

  if (!is.null(bert_files$learning_curve) && file.exists(bert_files$learning_curve)) {
    lc_bert <- read_external_learning_curve(bert_files$learning_curve, bert_model_name)
    lc_res <- bind_rows(lc_res, lc_bert)
    if (!bert_model_name %in% names(pal_model)) pal_model[bert_model_name] <- "#7A3E9D"
  }

  saveRDS(
    list(
      created_at = Sys.time(),
      oof_long = oof_long,
      oof_hard_long = oof_hard_long,
      lc_res = lc_res,
      pal_model = pal_model,
      pal_class = pal_class,
      threshold_tbl = threshold_tbl
    ),
    cache_A,
    compress = "xz"
  )
}
```

```{r}
#| label: plot-tables
#| message: false

if (file.exists(cache_B) && !overwrite_fig_cache) {
  B <- readRDS(cache_B)
  roc_list <- B$roc_list
  auc_tbl <- B$auc_tbl
  roc_df <- B$roc_df
  wide_logits <- B$wide_logits
  rho <- B$rho
  rho_df <- B$rho_df
  top_feats <- B$top_feats
  fold_metrics <- B$fold_metrics
  cm_long <- B$cm_long
} else {
  plot_tables <- build_plot_tables(oof_long, oof_hard_long = oof_hard_long)
  roc_list <- plot_tables$roc_list
  auc_tbl <- plot_tables$auc_tbl
  roc_df <- plot_tables$roc_df
  wide_logits <- plot_tables$wide_logits
  rho <- plot_tables$rho
  rho_df <- plot_tables$rho_df
  fold_metrics <- plot_tables$fold_metrics
  cm_long <- plot_tables$cm_long

  top_feats <- if (!is.null(bert_files$features) && file.exists(bert_files$features)) {
    read_external_features(bert_files$features, bert_model_name)
  } else {
    NULL
  }

  save_cache_B(cache_B, plot_tables, top_feats = top_feats)
}
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-roc
#| fig-cap: "ROC curves (out-of-fold)"
#| fig-width: 8.8
#| fig-height: 6.2

p_roc <- ggplot(roc_df, aes(x = fpr, y = tpr, color = model_lab)) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linewidth = 0.8, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey65") +
  geom_path(linewidth = 1.2, alpha = 0.95) +
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = setNames(unname(pal_model[as.character(auc_tbl$model)]), auc_tbl$model_lab)) +
  labs(
    x = "False Positive Rate",
    y = "True Positive Rate",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_modelviz

ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "01_roc_all_models.png"), p_roc, width = 8.8, height = 6.2, dpi = 320)
p_roc
```


```{r}
#| label: fig-density
#| fig-cap: "OOF score distributions (density)"
#| fig-width: 8.8
#| fig-height: 10.0

p_density <- ggplot(oof_long, aes(x = logit, color = true_label, fill = true_label)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.22, linewidth = 1.0) +
  facet_wrap(~ model, scales = "free", ncol = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = pal_class) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal_class) +
  labs(
    x = "OOF logit score",
    y = "Density",
    color = NULL,
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_modelviz +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "02b_oof_distributions_density.png"), p_density, width = 8.8, height = 10.0, dpi = 320)
p_density
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-learning-curves
#| fig-cap: "Learning curves (OOF ROC-AUC)"
#| fig-width: 9.8
#| fig-height: 6.2

p_lc_auc <- ggplot(lc_res, aes(x = frac * 100, y = auc, color = model)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 1.1) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 2.2) +
  stat_summary(
    fun.data = mean_sdl,
    fun.args = list(mult = 1),
    geom = "ribbon",
    aes(fill = model),
    alpha = 0.15,
    color = NA
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = pal_model) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal_model) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = sort(unique(lc_res$frac * 100))) +
  labs(
    x = "% of labeled training data",
    y = "OOF ROC-AUC",
    color = NULL,
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_modelviz +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "03_learning_curves_auc.png"), p_lc_auc, width = 9.8, height = 6.2, dpi = 320)
p_lc_auc
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-correlation
#| fig-cap: "Correlation between model-predicted logits"
#| fig-width: 8.2
#| fig-height: 6.8

library(ggplot2)

rho_min <- min(rho_df$rho)

rho_df$rho_scaled <- 0.5 + 0.5 * (rho_df$rho - rho_min) / (1 - rho_min)

p_cor <- ggplot(rho_df, aes(x = model_x, y = model_y)) +
  geom_tile(fill = "grey96", color = "white", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(aes(size = rho_scaled, color = rho), show.legend = TRUE) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", rho)),
            size = 3.4, fontface = "bold", color = "white") +
  scale_size_continuous(
    range  = c(8, 22),
    guide  = "none"
  ) +
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colours = c("#0D0887", "#5B02A3", "#9A179B", "#CB4678",
                "#EB7852", "#FBB32F", "#F0F921"),
    limits  = c(floor(rho_min * 10) / 10, 1),
    name    = "Spearman's Correlation",
    guide   = guide_colorbar(
      barwidth  = 1.2,
      barheight = 12,
      title.position = "top"
    )
  ) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_modelviz +
  theme(
    axis.title      = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x     = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1, size = 11),
    axis.text.y     = element_text(size = 11),
    panel.grid      = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    legend.position  = "right",
    legend.title     = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    legend.text      = element_text(size = 9)
  )

ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "04_logit_correlation_heatmap.png"),
       p_cor, width = 8.2, height = 6.8, dpi = 320)
p_cor
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-foldwise-f1
#| fig-cap: "Fold-wise F1 distribution (OOF)"
#| fig-width: 9.2
#| fig-height: 5.8

p_f1_fold <- ggplot(fold_metrics, aes(x = model, y = F1, color = model)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.08, height = 0), size = 2.1, alpha = 0.85) +
  scale_color_manual(values = pal_model) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "F1 (per fold)",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_modelviz +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1), legend.position = "none")

ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "S1_foldwise_f1.png"), p_f1_fold, width = 9.2, height = 5.8, dpi = 320)
p_f1_fold
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-confusion-matrices
#| fig-cap: "Confusion matrices (OOF)"
#| fig-width: 11.5
#| fig-height: 6.8

p_cm <- ggplot(cm_long, aes(x = truth, y = pred, fill = n)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), size = 5.0) +
  facet_wrap(~ model, ncol = 3) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(colors = viridisLite::viridis(12), name = "Count") +
  labs(
    x = "True label",
    y = "Predicted label"
  ) +
  theme_modelviz +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "S2_confusion_matrices.png"), p_cm, width = 11.5, height = 6.8, dpi = 320)
p_cm
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-features
#| fig-cap: "Top features / importance summaries"
#| fig-width: 11.0
#| fig-height: 7.0
#| eval: !expr '!is.null(top_feats)'

p_feats <- make_feature_plot(top_feats)
if (!is.null(p_feats)) {
  ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "S3_features.png"), p_feats, width = 11.0, height = 7.0, dpi = 320)
  p_feats
}
```

```{r}
#| label: summary-output
#| message: false

# Return summary list (available in environment after render)
list(
  oof_long = oof_long,
  oof_hard_long = oof_hard_long,
  lc_res = lc_res,
  threshold_tbl = threshold_tbl,
  p_roc = p_roc,
  p_density = p_density,
  p_lc_auc = p_lc_auc,
  p_cor = p_cor,
  p_feats = if (exists("p_feats")) p_feats else NULL,
  p_f1_fold = p_f1_fold,
  p_cm = p_cm
)
```
